title: Page Version Published Response Schema
description: Response for POST /cms-api/v1/admin/pages/{page_id}/versions/publish and /versions/{version_id}/publish (PageVersionController). Datetimes are normalized to ISO-8601 strings by the Symfony serializer.

version_id.description: ID of the published page version.

version_number.description: Sequential version number for the page.

published_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp the version was published.
